nodes.itemHTML: • MAT - Java heap analyzer that help find memory leaks and reduce memory consumption.
• tcpdump - Packet analyzer for network traffic capture.
• tcpflowstars1.2k - Captures TCP connections flows in a way that is convenient for protocol analysis and debugging.
• tcpreplaystars766 - Pcap editing and replay tools.
• muxystars761 - Simulating real-world distributed system failures.
• statsd-jvm-profilerstars330 - JVM agent profiler that sends profiling data to StatsD.
• comcaststars6.9k - Simulating shitty network connections.
• leakcanarystars26.1k - A memory leak detection library for Android and Java.
• pigstars389 - A Linux packet crafting tool.
• jammstars574 - Measure actual object memory use including JVM overhead.
• aprofstars201 - Java memory allocation profiler.
• hppcstars765 - High Performance Primitive Collections.
• heapsterstars387 - Production heap profiling for the JVM.
• perf-map-agentstars1.4k - Generate method mappings to use with the linux perf tool.
• java-sizeofstars124 - Memory consumption estimator for Java.
• gorstars14.1k - HTTP traffic replay in real-time.
• jRTstars44 - Measures response time of a java application to socket-based requests.
• K3POstars41 - Create arbitrary network traffic and behavior to certify whether a network endpoint behaves correctly.
• low-gc-membuffersstars130 - In-memory circular buffers that use direct ByteBuffers to minimize GC overhead.
• Filter Tablestars170 - Live searching/filtering for HTML tables.

• HighchartTablestars269 - Simple way to convert HTML data tables to Highcharts graphs.

• Stackable.jsstars1k - Stacking tables on small screens.
• Stupid Table Sortstars704 - A stupidly small and simple jQuery table sorter plugin.
• pifystars1.4k - Promisify ("denodify") a callback-style function.

• Canary Release - Technique to reduce the risk of introducing a new software version in production by slowly rolling out the change to a small subset of users before rolling it out to the entire infrastructure and making it available to everybody.
• AMQP - Advanced Message Queuing Protocol.
• MQTT - MQ Telemetry Transport.
• STOMP - Simple Text Oriented Messaging Protocol.

• Apidocstars469 - Beautiful documentation for REST services.

• Isotopestars10.3k - Filter & sort magical layouts.
• penstars317 - Live Markdown preview in the browser from your favorite editor.

• Viscosity - Fully-featured OpenVPN client, ready for enterprise deployment.
• Jitescriptstars176 - Bytecode generation library similar to BiteScript.
• hawkshawstars40 - Tools for tracking down memory / JVM problems & generating predictable-as-possible VM behaviour.
• polarbearstars20 - A tool to help diagnose OutOfMemoryError conditions.
• allocation-instrumenterstars407 - Java agent that rewrites bytecode to instrument allocation sites.
• perfjstars355 - Linux perf for java programs.
• OmniGraffle - An app for creating precise, beautiful graphics.

• jQuery Form Validatorstars976 - Validate user input while keeping your HTML markup clean from JavaScript code.

• TextBar - TextBar is a tiny but powerful app that lets you add any text to your MenuBar.
• lie-fs - Promise wrappers for Node's FS API.

nodes.itemHTML: • Elm for Web Developersstars59 - A collection of notes for web developers looking into moving to Elm.

nodes.categoryHTML: Tips, tricks, tools, and add-ons for GitHub power users
nodes.itemHTML: • github-secret-keeperstars73 - Microservice to enable GitHub login for multiple server-less applications.
• jQuery Mapaelstars983 - Plugin based on raphael.js that allows you to display dynamic vector maps.
• jsGridstars1.5k - Lightweight grid plugin.
• Gridderstars450 - Displays a thumbnail grid expanding preview similar to the effect seen on Google Images.
• Labelautystars914 - A lightweight and beautiful plugin for radio and checkbox inputs.
• fakeLoader.jsstars710 - Lightweight plugin that helps you create an animated spinner with a fullscreen loading mask to simulate the page preloading effect.
• bluebirdstars19.6k - Fully featured, extremely performant. Long stack traces & generator/coroutine support.
• rsvp.jsstars3.6k - Lightweight with a few extras. Compatible down to IE6!
• Qstars14.9k - One of the original implementations. Long stack traces and other goodies.
• then/promisestars2.4k - Small with nodeify, denodify and done() additions.
• when.jsstars3.4k - Packed with control flow, functional, and utility methods.
• native-or-bluebird - Helps transition to completely native.
• pinkie-promisestars120 - Use native, or fall back to pinkie. Great for node library authors.
• any-promisestars176 - Loads the first available implementation. Safe for browserify.
• promise-methodstars2 - Standalone bluebird.method. Turn a synchronously-returning method into a promise-returning one.
• is-promisestars259 - Determine if something looks like a Promise.
• spromstars14 - Resolve when a stream ends. Optional buffering (be careful with this!)
• task.jsstars1.6k - Write async functions in a blocking style using promises and generators. Like bluebird.coroutine.
• costars11.5k - Like task.js and bluebird.coroutine, but supports thunks too.
• jQuery patternsstars1.6k - A variety of jQuery plugin patterns for jump starting your plugin development.
• Learn jQuery - jQuery learning center.

• Learning jQuery - Fourth Edition - Guide to jQuery, by Jonathan Chaffer and Karl Swedberg.

All permissions are defined in a single location (the Ability class) and not duplicated across controllers, views, and database queries.

• Impressioniststars1.4k - Impressionist can log page impressions (technically action impressions), but it is not limited to that. You can log impressions multiple times per request. And you can also attach it to a model. The goal of this project is to provide customizable stats that are immediately accessible in your application as opposed to using Google Analytics and pulling data using their API.

• IntelMQstars644 - IntelMQ is a solution for CERTs for collecting and processing security feeds, pastebins, tweets using a message queue protocol. It's a community driven initiative called IHAP (Incident Handling Automation Project) which was conceptually designed by European CERTs during several InfoSec events. Its main goal is to give to incident responders an easy way to collect & process threat intelligence thus improving the incident handling processes of CERTs. ENSIA Homepage.
